description_long: This is a classic wristwatch featuring a round dial encased in a metallic housing, attached to a segmented metal link bracelet. The dial is light-colored with dark hour markers and hands, providing clear legibility. The watch case appears robust, with a crown on the right side for adjusting the time. The bracelet is composed of interlocking metal links, giving it a polished and durable appearance suitable for daily urban wear. The back of the watch is solid, with no visible caseback markings or engravings. The overall design is elegant and functional, making it a suitable accessory for both casual and formal urban settings.
description: A round-dial wristwatch with a metallic link bracelet and clear, dark hour markers on a light face. The design is classic, polished, and suitable for everyday urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round dial, hour markers, hands, and the full length of the metal bracelet.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the slimness of the watch case and the curvature of the bracelet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back of the watch and the segmented metal bracelet.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the case thickness and bracelet curvature, with the crown slightly visible.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is minimalist with a light background, featuring dark, evenly spaced hour markers and simple hands. There are no numerals, subdials, or decorative patterns, giving it a clean and classic appearance.
attribute_strap_type: Metal link bracelet made of stainless steel, composed of interlocking segments for flexibility and durability.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with two or three hands (hour, minute, and possibly second), arranged centrally with no additional complications or special features.
